exercises.title: Distance Scaling Calculator
exercises.description: Analyze rate vs distance for direct and repeater transmission.
tasks: Calculate direct transmission rate vs distance
Find crossover distance where repeater wins
exercises.expectedOutput: Complete scaling analysis tool with visualization

exercises.title: Three Operations Simulator
exercises.description: Implement the three fundamental repeater operations.
tasks: Implement entanglement generation with realistic losses
Implement entanglement swapping with fidelity tracking
hints: Track both success rates and fidelities

exercises.title: Optimal Segment Finder
exercises.description: Find optimal number of segments for given distance and parameters.
tasks: Model rate as function of segment count
Find optimal N for maximum rate
hints: More segments: better transmission, more swaps
Fewer segments: fewer swaps, worse transmission

exercises.title: Repeater Generation Comparison
exercises.description: Compare performance of different repeater generations.
hints: Consider both rate and node complexity
